parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS default_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS default_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_delivery_mode', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to', 'email_signature_template_key', 'n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Resolve Preview Request').first().json ?? {};
const sqlLiteral = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return 'NULL';
  return "'" + String(value).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
};
const refundIdSql = Number.isInteger(input.refund_id) ? String(input.refund_id) : 'NULL';
const sql = `WITH refund_row AS (
  SELECT r.id, r.name, r.refund_for, r.reason, r.membership, r.amount, r.refund, r.months,
         r.from_date, r.to_date, r.status, r.explanation, r.notes,
         r.request_email_message_id, r.bank_details_message_id, r.treasury_email_message_id
  FROM public.refunds r
  WHERE r.id = ${refundIdSql}
  LIMIT 1
), requestor_contact AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM refund_row r
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
    trim(r.name),
    '',
    NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(trim(r.name), '^[^ ]+ ?', '')), ''),
    FALSE
  ) bc ON TRUE
  LIMIT 1
), main_template AS (
  SELECT template_key, template_name, subject_template, text_template, html_template
  FROM public.email_templates
  WHERE template_key = ${sqlLiteral(input.template_key)}
    AND is_active = true
    AND template_type = 0
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
), signature_template AS (
  SELECT template_key, template_name, subject_template, text_template, html_template
  FROM public.email_templates
  WHERE template_key = ${sqlLiteral(input.signature_template_key || 'signature')}
    AND is_active = true
    AND template_type = 2
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  r.id,
  r.name,
  r.refund_for,
  r.reason,
  r.membership,
  r.amount,
  r.refund,
  r.months,
  r.from_date,
  r.to_date,
  r.status,
  r.explanation,
  r.notes,
  r.request_email_message_id,
  r.bank_details_message_id,
  r.treasury_email_message_id,
  trim(r.name) AS requestor_name,
  split_part(trim(r.name), ' ', 1) AS requestor_first_name,
  NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(trim(r.name), '^[^ ]+ ?', '')), '') AS requestor_last_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.email_address), ''), NULL) AS requestor_email,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.address_1), ''), '') AS requestor_address_1,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.town), ''), '') AS requestor_town,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), ''), '') AS requestor_postcode,
  (SELECT template_key FROM main_template) AS template_key,
  (SELECT template_name FROM main_template) AS template_name,
  (SELECT subject_template FROM main_template) AS subject_template,
  (SELECT text_template FROM main_template) AS text_template,
  (SELECT html_template FROM main_template) AS html_template,
  (SELECT template_key FROM signature_template) AS signature_template_key,
  (SELECT text_template FROM signature_template) AS signature_text_template,
  (SELECT html_template FROM signature_template) AS signature_html_template,
  CASE
    WHEN r.id IS NULL THEN 'Refund not found.'
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM main_template) THEN 'Email template ' || ${sqlLiteral(input.template_key)} || ' was not found or is not an active message template'
    WHEN ${sqlLiteral(input.action_type)} = 'request_bank_details' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.email_address), ''), '') = '' THEN 'No email address was found for ' || COALESCE(trim(r.name), 'the requestor') || '.'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS error_message
FROM (SELECT 1) seed
LEFT JOIN refund_row r ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN requestor_contact rc ON TRUE;`;
return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];

const input = $('Resolve Preview Request').first().json ?? {};
const refundIdSql = Number.isInteger(input.refund_id) ? String(input.refund_id) : 'NULL';
const sql = `WITH refund_row AS (
  SELECT r.id, r.name, r.refund_for, r.reason, r.membership, r.amount, r.refund, r.months,
         r.from_date, r.to_date, r.status, r.explanation, r.notes,
         r.request_email_message_id, r.bank_details_message_id, r.treasury_email_message_id
  FROM public.refunds r
  WHERE r.id = ${refundIdSql}
  LIMIT 1
), base_member AS (
  SELECT rm.id AS raw_member_id,
         trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) AS member_name,
         NULLIF(trim(rm."Email address"), '') AS member_email,
         rm."Membership" AS membership
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  CROSS JOIN refund_row r
  WHERE COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
    AND trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) = r.refund_for
    AND (r.membership IS NULL OR r.membership = '' OR rm."Membership" = r.membership)
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN rm."Membership" = r.membership THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, rm.id
  LIMIT 1
), member_contact AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM refund_row r
  LEFT JOIN base_member bm ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
    COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for),
    COALESCE(bm.member_email, ''),
    NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for), '^[^ ]+ ?', '')), ''),
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM public.raw_members rmf
      WHERE COALESCE(rmf.is_current, true) = true
        AND trim(concat_ws(' ', rmf."First name", rmf."Last name")) = COALESCE(bm.member_name, r.refund_for)
        AND rmf."Membership" ILIKE '%Family%'
    )
  ) bc ON TRUE
  LIMIT 1
), requestor_contact AS (
  SELECT bc.*
  FROM refund_row r
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
    trim(r.name),
    '',
    NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(trim(r.name), '^[^ ]+ ?', '')), ''),
    FALSE
  ) bc ON TRUE
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  r.id,
  r.name,
  r.refund_for,
  r.reason,
  r.membership,
  r.amount,
  r.refund,
  r.months,
  r.from_date,
  r.to_date,
  r.status,
  r.explanation,
  r.notes,
  r.request_email_message_id,
  r.bank_details_message_id,
  r.treasury_email_message_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(mc.email_address), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(bm.member_email), '')) AS member_email,
  trim(r.name) AS requestor_name,
  split_part(trim(r.name), ' ', 1) AS requestor_first_name,
  NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(trim(r.name), '^[^ ]+ ?', '')), '') AS requestor_last_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.email_address), ''), NULL) AS requestor_email,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.address_1), ''), '') AS requestor_address_1,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.town), ''), '') AS requestor_town,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rc.postcode), ''), '') AS requestor_postcode
FROM refund_row r
LEFT JOIN base_member bm ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN member_contact mc ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN requestor_contact rc ON TRUE;`;
return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];
